arts.ttl: Player Ratings: Athletic Bilbao 2 - 1 Real Madrid; 2024 La Liga
arts.sum: Tchouameni—3: Ancelotti hinted that the Frenchman would start as his height would be important for set-pieces.Felt like the player was shoehorned into the line-up and disrupted the good dynamic of the team. Made a glaring mistake in the final minutes of the game, trying to nutmeg an Athletic player in his own half, leading to the game-winning goal for Atheltic Bilbao.
